subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! It is hoped that, through the favours of the Ancient Beauty, thou mayest shine forth among the handmaids of the All-Merciful even as a candle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله از الطاف جمال قدم امید است که در بین اماء الرحمن چون شمع برافروزی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
